items.name: Glacial Eye Topper Of The Iceworld
items.description:
This item is going to be available for free in a future event in 2-3 days. If u want to participate, check my group or join gg/7CpgNnQH5z

"Behold the Glacial Eye Topper of the Iceworld, a mesmerizing accessory that embodies the frigid allure of frozen realms. Adorned with intricate frost patterns and crowned with a majestic top hat, this accessory is the epitome of icy elegance. Dare to gaze into its crystalline depths and let its frosty charm transport you to the enchanting landscapes of the Iceworld."
